summary: Russian forces lost a Ka-52 helicopter near Nadiivka, Donetsk, to an FPV drone strike, with the crew killed during an evacuation attempt. In Krasnoyarskoye, DNR, an airstrike hit a Ukrainian drone launch point and air defense system. The 412 Nemesis Brigade destroyed over 130 motor vehicles, dozens of motorcycles and quad bikes, and eliminated three targets near Huliaipole in January-February 2026. The Ukrainian Navy used an FPV drone to sink an enemy boat near Tendrivska Spit, Kherson Oblast. The "Elka" anti-drone system achieved kinetic interceptions of Ukrainian fixed-wing drones "Darts" and "Maya," triggering onboard charges. The SBU's "Alpha" unit neutralized 1,834 Russian personnel in a week using FPV drones. The "Rubikon" Center reported 83 targets eliminated on March 21, 2026, including personnel, UAVs, and control points. An Iranian-backed militia launched a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian pilots are experimenting with tactics to disrupt Russian infantry before strikes, and a Russian soldier was recorded charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and being killed.
